stimulus: In 2019, composers Mei Lin Chen and Diego Ramirez rescored the orchestral interludes and dance sequences for The San Francisco Opera’s production of The ______blank to critics, the rescoring helped knit the production with currents drawn from contemporary Mexican and Taiwanese folk music.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The convention being tested is punctuation use between sentences. The period correctly marks the boundary between one sentence (“In 2019...Magic Flute”) and another (“According...music”). The supplementary element “according to critics” modifies the main clause of the second sentence.

Choice A is incorrect because it results in a comma splice. Choice C is incorrect because it results in a run-on sentence. Choice D is incorrect because it results in a run-on sentence; in addition, no punctuation is needed within the supplementary element “according to critics.”
